languages.text: "Ваша правда: вера у нас одна. Господа — господами, а все же лучше в себя стрелять, чем по святым символам". {n}Сержант усмехается, и в его взгляде загорается неприятный огонек.{/n}
languages.translation_comment: повысит DL_DynastySurrender_counter на 2. Стартуют Obj2_Add_Merovians и DL_TraitorZarkov

traits.locale_text: "Ваша правда: вера у нас одна. Господа — господами, а все же лучше в себя стрелять, чем по святым символам". {n}Сержант усмехается, и в его взгляде загорается неприятный огонек.{/n}

languages.translation_comment: повысит DL_DynastySurrender_counter на 2. Стартуют Obj2_Add_Merovians и DL_TraitorZarkov

languages.text: "You're right: we share the one faith. Nobles are nobles, but we'd be better off shooting ourselves than at any holy symbols." {n}The sergeant chuckles, with a nasty glint in his eye.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ваша правда: вера у нас одна. Господа — господами, а все же лучше в себя стрелять, чем по святым символам". {n}Сержант усмехается, и в его взгляде загорается неприятный огонек.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "You're right: we share the one faith. Nobles are nobles, but we'd be better off shooting ourselves than at any holy symbols." {n}The sergeant chuckles, with a nasty glint in his eye.{/n}
"You're right: we share the one faith. Nobles are nobles, but we'd be better off shooting ourselves than at any holy symbols." {n}The sergeant chuckles, with a nasty glint in his eye.{/n}
"You're right: we share the one faith. Nobles are nobles, but we'd be better off shooting ourselves than at any holy symbols." {n}The sergeant chuckles, with a nasty glint in his eye.{/n}

languages.text: “您说得对，我们有同一个信仰。贵族归贵族，但要是让我们对着圣物开火，那还不如直接吞枪自尽。”{n}军士轻笑一声，眼中闪过一丝阴狠。{/n}
languages.original_text: "You're right: we share the one faith. Nobles are nobles, but we'd be better off shooting ourselves than at any holy symbols." {n}The sergeant chuckles, with a nasty glint in his eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “您说得对，我们有同一个信仰。贵族归贵族，但要是让我们对着圣物开火，那还不如直接吞枪自尽。”{n}军士轻笑一声，眼中闪过一丝阴狠。{/n}

languages.text: « Vous avez raison : on est unis par la même foi. Les nobles sont les nobles, mais on ferait mieux de se coller une balle dans la tête plutôt que de tirer sur des symboles sacrés, » {n}répond le sergent avec un petit rire et une lueur malveillante dans les yeux.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You're right: we share the one faith. Nobles are nobles, but we'd be better off shooting ourselves than at any holy symbols." {n}The sergeant chuckles, with a nasty glint in his eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez raison : on est unis par la même foi. Les nobles sont les nobles, mais on ferait mieux de se coller une balle dans la tête plutôt que de tirer sur des symboles sacrés, » {n}répond le sergent avec un petit rire et une lueur malveillante dans les yeux.{/n}

languages.text: "Haklısınız. İnancımız bir. Soylular soyludur ama kutsal sembollere ateş etmektense kendimizi vurmamız daha iyi olur." {n}Çavuş, gözünde iğrenç bir parıltıyla kıkırdıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You're right: we share the one faith. Nobles are nobles, but we'd be better off shooting ourselves than at any holy symbols." {n}The sergeant chuckles, with a nasty glint in his eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Haklısınız. İnancımız bir. Soylular soyludur ama kutsal sembollere ateş etmektense kendimizi vurmamız daha iyi olur." {n}Çavuş, gözünde iğrenç bir parıltıyla kıkırdıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Tiene razón: compartimos la única fe. Los nobles son nobles, pero antes nos pegaríamos un tiro que dañar un símbolo sagrado». {n}El sargento se ríe con un brillo peligroso en la mirada.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You're right: we share the one faith. Nobles are nobles, but we'd be better off shooting ourselves than at any holy symbols." {n}The sergeant chuckles, with a nasty glint in his eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Tiene razón: compartimos la única fe. Los nobles son nobles, pero antes nos pegaríamos un tiro que dañar un símbolo sagrado». {n}El sargento se ríe con un brillo peligroso en la mirada.{/n}

languages.text: "Ihr habt recht: Wir teilen den einen Glauben. Adelige sind Adelige, aber wir würden uns lieber selbst erschießen als auf irgendwelche heiligen Symbole." {n}Der Sergeant lacht mit einem hässlichen Funkeln in seinem Auge.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You're right: we share the one faith. Nobles are nobles, but we'd be better off shooting ourselves than at any holy symbols." {n}The sergeant chuckles, with a nasty glint in his eye.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt recht: Wir teilen den einen Glauben. Adelige sind Adelige, aber wir würden uns lieber selbst erschießen als auf irgendwelche heiligen Symbole." {n}Der Sergeant lacht mit einem hässlichen Funkeln in seinem Auge.{/n}

languages.text: 「君が言う通りだ。我々は同じ信仰を持つ。貴族は貴族だが、聖なる象徴を撃つよりも、我々自身を撃つ方が良いだろう。」{n}軍曹は悪意に満ちた目で笑う.{/n}
languages.original_text: "You're right: we share the one faith. Nobles are nobles, but we'd be better off shooting ourselves than at any holy symbols." {n}The sergeant chuckles, with a nasty glint in his eye.{/n}
